# MoJion AI

> Custom AI voice agents and workflow automations for businesses. Built on Vapi + n8n. Production-grade, client-owned systems with no vendor lock-in.

MoJion AI is an AI automation agency founded in July 2025 by Matthew Lingle and Jeffrey Alte, based in Orlando, Florida. We build custom AI voice agents and end-to-end workflow automations for small and mid-sized businesses that want production-grade systems they own outright.

## What we do
- AI voice agents (Vapi-based receptionists, sales, outbound)
- Workflow automation (n8n, human-in-the-loop via Slack, CRM integration)
- Lead intelligence (enrich, score, route)
- AI consulting and architecture review

## Industries we serve
- Home services and moving
- Equipment dealers
- E-commerce
- Healthcare (HIPAA-ready patterns)

## Differentiators
- Client ownership: you own the code, prompts, workflows, and integrations. No vendor lock-in.
- Architecture discipline: AI is restricted to language and classification; deterministic workflows enforce business outcomes. Failures are isolated and auditable.
- Accountability: E&O insured. Structured logging, human-in-the-loop escalation, and recording consent are first-class design behaviors, not afterthoughts.
- Compliance posture: GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA-ready.

## Engagement model
- Discovery: ~2 days
- Design and prototype: ~3 days
- Build and integration: ~1 week
- Launch and 2-week supervised live period
- Typical end-to-end: 2 to 4 weeks

## Pricing
Project-scoped. Smaller automations start around $500. Larger receptionist and multi-agent systems are quoted per engagement after a free Discovery call.

## Named clients (public)
- Undergrads Moving (multi-agent voice system)
- Big Man's Moving (single voice agent)
